name: generateContent generates valid robots.txt content
fullName: root:packages/studiocms/test/integrations/robots/core.test.ts#studiocms Tests generateContent generates valid robots.txt content

steps.name:
expect("User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /private
Crawl-delay: 1
Clean-param: ref

# crawling rule(s) for above bots
Sitemap: https://site/sitemap.xml
Host: ex... <truncated>).toContain("User-agent: *")

expect("User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /private
Crawl-delay: 1
Clean-param: ref

Sitemap: https://site/sitemap.xml
Host: ex... <truncated>).toContain("Allow: /")

expect("User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /private
Crawl-delay: 1
Clean-param: ref

# crawling rule(s) for above bots
Sitemap: https://site/sitemap.xml
Host: ex... <truncated>).toContain("Disallow: /private")

expect("User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /private
Crawl-delay: 1
Clean-param: ref

# crawling rule(s) for above bots
Sitemap: https://site/sitemap.xml
Host: ex... <truncated>).toContain("Crawl-delay: 1")

expect("User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /private
Crawl-delay: 1
Clean-param: ref

# crawling rule(s) for above bots
Sitemap: https://site/sitemap.xml
Host: ex... <truncated>).toContain("Clean-param: ref")

expect("User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /private

Clean-param: ref

# crawling rule(s) for above bots

Host: ex... <truncated>).toContain("Sitemap: https://site/sitemap.xml")

Allow: /

Host: ex... <truncated>).toContain("Host: example.com")
